variants: Sofia Rocafuerte is a prominent inventor known for her groundbreaking work on the Dreamcatcher Interface System. In addition to her inventions, Sofia is also an active member of the Willowwood Archivists, where she dedicates her efforts to preserving and understanding historical artifacts. Her dual commitment to innovation and archival work reflects her deep interest in both technology and history.
